description: Complete merged mapping pack for Raize/Konopka Signature VCL controls. Combines the original base pack with supplemental entries covering label, image, date/time picker, calendar, scroll box, radio group, color edit, and spin buttons.

rules.notes: Basic button behavior maps well. Raize styling, glyph layout, and visual states require review.
Button caption and click map. Glyph/kind/layout behavior requires review.
Basic edit text maps well. Frame controller, button edit features, and validation require review.
Basic memo text maps. Raize frame and visual styling require review.
Basic caption and checked state map. Custom glyphs and visual states require review.
Basic radio button maps. Grouping and styling require review.
Basic items and selection map. Frame controller, custom drawing, and lookup behavior require review.
Basic items map. Multi-select, owner-draw, and styling require review.
Container behavior maps. Borders, gradients, captions, and Raize appearance settings require review.
Group caption and container behavior map. Raize visual styling requires review.
Page structure maps. Tab styling, images, close buttons, and owner-draw behavior require review.
Tab caption maps. Raize tab styling requires review.
Basic progress value maps conceptually. Orientation, theme, and text display require review.
Basic trackbar value maps conceptually. Tick marks and styling require review.
Splitter behavior is plausible. Alignment and adjacent layout behavior require review.

rules.manual_review_reason: Status panels and owner-drawn panes require manual FMX status layout.
Toolbar/action layout should be redesigned using FMX buttons/tool layouts.
Data-aware grid behavior requires manual redesign or a grid-specific mapping pack.
Check tree nodes, state images, and data model require manual review.
Embedded edit buttons and actions require explicit FMX redesign.
Property persistence behavior is application-specific and should be reviewed manually.

rules.notes: Basic label text maps to FMX TLabel. Raize visual styling, font controller, and hot-track behavior require review.
Image display maps to FMX TImage. Raize border, shadow, and stretch effects require review.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify image resource loading, stretch mode, and any Raize-specific visual effects.

rules.notes: Date picker UI maps to FMX TDateEdit for basic date selection. Time portion, null date, formatting, and Raize extras require review.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify date/time formatting, null date handling, and frame controller behavior.

rules.notes: Calendar date selection maps conceptually to FMX TCalendar. Raize styling, multi-select, and event indicators require review.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify date selection events and any custom day highlighting or formatting.

rules.notes: Scroll container behavior maps to FMX TScrollBox. Raize scroll bar styling and extras require review.

rules.manual_review_reason: Raize radio group item layout, value semantics, and frame controller behavior require deliberate FMX redesign. Use individual TRadioButton controls grouped in a TLayout or TGroupBox.

rules.notes: Color picker maps to a plain TEdit for the hex/text value. Popup color selector and color swatch display cannot be auto-recreated.
rules.manual_review_reason: Implement color selection using FMX TColorPanel, TColorBox, or a custom color picker dialog.
Standalone Raize spin buttons have no direct FMX equivalent. Implement using TSpinBox or a custom TLayout with Up/Down TSpeedButton controls.
